{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Scavengers (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Scavengers are people who hang around battles to get something out of them.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Scavengers. Don’t worry about them. They’ll hang around any battle to see if they can get something out of it.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
